description: Letter from Shemuel b. Yehuda ha-Bavli to Berakhot he-Haver. Shemuel writes that after searching the book dealers of Egypt for rare titles, he learned in Alexandria that the Greeks had many schools with fine scholars, and so he has made up his mind to go on to Thebes and Salonika in Greece after Passover. First, however, he will come to Fustat to collect the books that he had ordered. Dating: ca. 1130s CE. See also T-S 13J11.8 (PGPID 940). (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב משמואל בן יהודה הבבלי לברכות החבר: לאחר חיפוש ספרים נדירים במצרים, גילה שביוון יש בתי ספר עם חכמים מעולים; מחליט לנסוע לתבות ולסלוניקי לאחר הפסח. כ-שנות ה-1130.
